items.question: What is Mine a Planet?
items.answer: Mine a Planet is a Roblox idle tycoon where drones mine a voxel planet, earn cash, and unlock planet and ore progression.

items.question: Are there Mine a Planet codes?
items.answer: The current source package verifies BETABETA from the Roblox group source. Future codes should be added only from official sources.

items.question: Does this site cover auto-farm scripts?
items.answer: No. It covers normal gameplay, upgrades, drones, money routes, and official code status only.

home.modulesDescription: Use these sections for safe Roblox progression, verified information, and update-aware guide planning.

modules.name: Mine a Planet Codes
modules.description: Show only official-source codes and rewards.

highlights.label: Source Rule
highlights.detail: Official Roblox group, game, or developer source only

highlights.label: Safety
highlights.detail: No script, executor, keyless, pastebin, or auto-farm content

modules.name: Mine a Planet Beginner Guide
modules.description: Start mining efficiently with drones, cash, and upgrades.

highlights.detail: Command a fleet of laser drones
Let idle cash climb over time
Upgrade speed, cargo, and mining power

modules.name: Mine a Planet Drones
modules.description: Understand rolls, rarity, and fleet growth.

highlights.label: Rolls
highlights.detail: Free unlimited rolls are part of the loop

highlights.label: Upgrade Role
highlights.detail: Drone performance affects mining speed and cash

modules.name: Mine a Planet Planet Evolution
modules.description: Move from one planet stage to larger worlds and rarer ore.

highlights.detail: Unlock rarer ore and bigger worlds

modules.name: Mine a Planet Ore Tiers
modules.description: Track ore progression without inventing a complete table.

highlights.label: Azurite
highlights.detail: Listed as an early example ore

highlights.label: Aurum
highlights.detail: Listed as a later example ore

highlights.label: Full Table
highlights.detail: Exact complete ore table needs later confirmation

modules.name: Mine a Planet Money Guide
modules.description: Use the idle tycoon loop for safe money progression.

highlights.detail: Let cash climb through the idle loop
Spend on speed, cargo, and mining power

modules.name: Mine a Planet Updates
modules.description: Track beta changes, code refreshes, and update-sensitive systems.

about: Mine a Planet is a Roblox idle tycoon and incremental simulator where players command laser drones to blast apart a voxel planet, generate cash, and evolve their world.
The official loop emphasizes idle income, drone rarity, planet evolution, ore tiers, free rolls, and speed, cargo, and mining power upgrades.

faq.question: What is Mine a Planet?
faq.answer: Mine a Planet is a Roblox idle tycoon where drones mine a voxel planet, earn cash, and unlock planet and ore progression.

faq.question: Are there Mine a Planet codes?
faq.answer: The current source package verifies BETABETA from the Roblox group source. Future codes should be added only from official sources.

faq.question: Does this site cover auto-farm scripts?
faq.answer: No. It covers normal gameplay, upgrades, drones, money routes, and official code status only.
